trigger.actions_2_targetA: Hello! Welcome to Hide and Seek!

trigger.actions_4_targetA: In this game seekers need to kill every hider. There is a timer for every round. Once round ends hiders win.

trigger.actions_26_targetB: Note: This room is meant to be ONLY for testing things

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Rate 5 stars so i can buy some bread
The round will end soon... Ghosts revealed! Sniper rifles cooldown reduced!

trigger.actions_11_targetA: SPECIAL ROUND: Now ghosts have guns! Who is surviving now? [Less time for round to end]

trigger.actions_1_targetA: The round will end soon... lets go more bom bom

trigger.actions_5_targetA: You should eliminate hiders. Keep in mind: they're invisible

trigger.actions_4_targetA: Note: You're invisible to seekers, dont make a sound. (watch out for their sniper lasers!)

trigger.actions_6_targetA: You found the toilet- wait thats the wrong map

trigger.actions_8_targetA: Super cool special secret ultra skin activated (from mr_jelly_f-clones map)

trigger.actions_3_targetA: - Pro tip: When playing as seeker you should use danger music to detect where hiders are.
- Pro tip: These tips are only for pros and not noobs
- Pro tip: When playing as hider try to be fast and do some selfboosting around the map to confuse seekers.
